scope: Normative keywords in docs/standards/rfc/draft-hyprstream-privacypass-pqhybrid-00.xml only. Each item maps one exact MUST/MUST NOT statement to an implemented test or a specification-only obligation with owner and blocker.

obligations.statement: The outer admission result MUST NOT be accepted as inner authorization, MAC clearance, or authority to release plaintext or an epoch key.
obligations.blocker: Inner anonymous capability and origin PEP do not exist until #1060-#1062 select and implement the reviewed construction.

obligations.statement: The origin MUST verify an inner capability and its exact binding before dispatch or key release.
obligations.blocker: No selected PQ anonymous issuance or binding construction.

obligations.statement: A relay MUST NOT be given or recover inner plaintext, decoded anonymous-capability or MAC-clearance material, a response key, a traffic key, or a group epoch key.
obligations.blocker: Production object encryption and network key-release lifecycle remain pending.

obligations.statement: Clients MUST send ordinary MOQT Object payload bytes that a stock relay can forward and cache unchanged.
obligations.blocker: Nested encrypted control Object profile and stock relay harness are not implemented.

obligations.statement: The profile MUST NOT require a MOQT extension or codepoint for the relay to forward the Object.
obligations.blocker: Requires final carriage review after #1060/#1061 construction selection.

obligations.statement: Implementations MUST reject an unknown registry label, a non-canonical encoding, or an out-of-bounds transcript field before cryptographic processing.
obligations.blocker: The construction-specific transcript parser and canonical wire encoding do not exist.

obligations.statement: An implementation MUST NOT substitute a holder DID, ATProto handle, or relay route for an inner binding field.
obligations.blocker: Canonical binding encoding and anonymous principal have not been selected/implemented.

obligations.statement: A production implementation MUST NOT issue, accept, redeem, dispatch, or release a key under this profile while the PQ construction and token type are unselected.
obligations.blocker: No production issuance or redemption path exists and no reviewed PQ anonymous construction is selected.

obligations.statement: The experimental boundary checker MUST require exactly two ordered roles, ClassicalAnonymous then PqAnonymous, combined with AND, and MUST reject a missing, duplicated, reordered, unknown, crossed, or stripped leg.
The boundary MUST reject any holder DID, ATProto handle, account identifier, or other stable holder subject field.
Each leg MUST use its dedicated Privacy Pass issuer-key purpose, and the boundary MUST reject cross-role key reuse or substitution of a mesh, PDS, response, or controller key.

The boundary MUST require exact accepted-current issuer, audience, state epoch and digest, policy generation, expiry, redemption context, and resource-profile commitment values and MUST reject stale, rolled-back, expired, or crossed values.
obligations.test: python3 tools/check_pq_anonymous_issuance.py (stale-state, policy-rollback, expiry, origin, and crossed-context controls)

obligations.statement: The experimental boundary checker MUST terminate a structurally valid fixture with the ConstructionUnselected refusal.
obligations.test: python3 tools/check_pq_anonymous_issuance.py (baseline structural success followed by production refusal)
